rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use only visible feature names in component type contracts
Declare AGREE types as int, real, or bool
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or named constants for range assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in dependency contracts
Declare helper variables with matching types to their expressions
Use valid AGREE scalar types in declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Component type annexes contain assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Avoid using AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions
Do not declare AGREE types as integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
